fato_historico: 2009: Caspian Airlines Flight 7908 crashes near Jannatabad, Qazvin, Iran, killing 168.
energia_do_dia: The stars invite you to embrace the fragility of life and the beauty of human connection. Just as clouds drift over vast horizons, memories may surface, reminding you to cherish your loved ones. It is a good time to practice empathy, perhaps seeking peace through gentle stillness and finding four-leaf clovers in the garden of your own soulful reflections.
frase_do_dia: Hold every precious moment close to your heart with deep and lasting gratitude.
significado_numero: Represents the awakening of spiritual awareness and inner wisdom.
conselho: Consider extending a warm, kind gesture to someone who needs your support today.
